description: Notification bell icon button with unread badge count and a dropdown panel showing notification items with severity icons, relative timestamps, and mark-as-read actions. Supports limiting visible items via MaxVisible parameter.

parameters.name: OnNotificationClick
parameters.description: Fires when a notification item is clicked.

parameters.name: OnMarkAsRead
parameters.description: Fires when mark-as-read is clicked for a single notification. Argument is the item Id.

parameters.name: OnMarkAllRead
parameters.description: Fires when the Mark all as read button is clicked.

parameters.name: MaxVisible
parameters.description: Maximum number of notifications shown in the dropdown.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true the bell button is disabled.

examples.title: Basic notification bell with all callbacks
Full usage with @code block
examples.code:
<TmNotificationBell Notifications="notifications"
                    OnNotificationClick="HandleClick"
                    OnMarkAsRead="HandleMarkAsRead"
                    OnMarkAllRead="HandleMarkAllRead"
                    MaxVisible="8" />

@code {
    private List<INotificationItem> notifications = new();

    private void HandleClick(INotificationItem item)
    {
        // Navigate or show detail
    }

    private void HandleMarkAsRead(string id)
    {
        var n = notifications.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Id == id);
        if (n is not null) n.IsRead = true;
    }

    private void HandleMarkAllRead()
    {
        foreach (var n in notifications) n.IsRead = true;
    }
}
